<|begin_of_text|><|start_header_id|>system<|end_header_id|>

You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties
anchor, offset_x, offset_y, size_x, size_y, padding, opacity, visible
TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size
IMAGE: tint, size_x, size_y
VBOX/HBOX: spacing

## Variable Naming Convention
PlayerHealth, MaxHealth, CurrentAmmo, MaxAmmo, WeaponName, Score, TimeRemaining, CurrentWave, TotalWaves, BossName, BossHealth, BossMaxHealth, Speed, CurrentGear, CurrentLap, TotalLaps, Position, XP, MaxXP, Mana, MaxMana, Stamina, MaxStamina, Gold, Level<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

Create a sci-fi neon health bar, positioned top-left<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

WIDGET: WBP_HealthBar
THEME: SciFi

CANVAS Root
  PROGRESS_BAR HealthBar
    @anchor: TopLeft
    @offset_x: 20
    @offset_y: 20
    @percent: BIND:PlayerHealth/MaxHealth
    @fill_color: $health
    @size_x: 250
    @size_y: 20<|eot_id|>

```
THEME: ThemeName
```

You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties

TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size

```
THEME: ThemeName
```

- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity

You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties
anchor, offset_x, offset_y, size_x, size_y, padding, opacity, visible
TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size
IMAGE: tint, size_x, size_y
VBOX/HBOX: spacing

## Variable Naming Convention
PlayerHealth, MaxHealth, CurrentAmmo, MaxAmmo, WeaponName, Score, TimeRemaining, CurrentWave, TotalWaves, BossName, BossHealth, BossMaxHealth, Speed, CurrentGear, CurrentLap, TotalLaps, Position, XP, MaxXP, Mana, MaxMana, Stamina, MaxStamina, Gold, Level<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties
anchor, offset_x, offset_y, size_x, size_y, padding, opacity, visible
TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size
IMAGE: tint, size_x, size_y
VBOX/HBOX: spacing

## Variable Naming Convention

```
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values

Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity

You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties
anchor, offset_x, offset_y, size_x, size_y, padding, opacity, visible
TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size
IMAGE: tint, size_x, size_y
VBOX/HBOX: spacing

## Variable Naming Convention
PlayerHealth, MaxHealth, CurrentAmmo, MaxAmmo, WeaponName, Score, TimeRemaining, CurrentWave, TotalWaves, BossName, BossHealth, BossMaxHealth, Speed, CurrentGear, CurrentLap, TotalLaps, Position, XP, MaxXP, Mana, MaxMana, Stamina, MaxStamina, Gold, Level<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties
anchor, offset_x, offset_y, size_x, size_y, padding, opacity, visible
TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size
IMAGE: tint, size_x, size_y
VBOX/HBOX: spacing

## Variable Naming Convention
PlayerHealth, MaxHealth, CurrentAmmo, MaxAmmo, WeaponName, Score, TimeRemaining, CurrentWave, TotalWaves, BossName, BossHealth, BossMaxHealth, Speed, CurrentGear, CurrentLap, TotalLaps, Position, XP, MaxXP, Mana, MaxMana, Stamina, MaxStamina, Gold, Level<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

Create a racing main menu with Play, Settings, and Quit buttons<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

WIDGET: WBP_MainMenu
THEME: Racing

CANVAS Root
  TEXT Title
    @anchor: Center
    @offset_y: -100
    @text: MY GAME
    @font_size: 48

    @bold: true
    @justification: Center
  BUTTON PlayBtn
    @anchor: Center

    @text: PLAY
    @font_size: 20
  BUTTON SettingsBtn
    @anchor: Center

    @text: SETTINGS
    @font_size: 20
  BUTTON QuitBtn
    @anchor: Center
    @offset_y: 100
    @text: QUIT
    @font_size: 20<|eot_id|>

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values

You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties
anchor, offset_x, offset_y, size_x, size_y, padding, opacity, visible
TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size
IMAGE: tint, size_x, size_y
VBOX/HBOX: spacing

## Variable Naming Convention
PlayerHealth, MaxHealth, CurrentAmmo, MaxAmmo, WeaponName, Score, TimeRemaining, CurrentWave, TotalWaves, BossName, BossHealth, BossMaxHealth, Speed, CurrentGear, CurrentLap, TotalLaps, Position, XP, MaxXP, Mana, MaxMana, Stamina, MaxStamina, Gold, Level<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties
anchor, offset_x, offset_y, size_x, size_y, padding, opacity, visible
TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size
IMAGE: tint, size_x, size_y
VBOX/HBOX: spacing

## Variable Naming Convention
PlayerHealth, MaxHealth, CurrentAmmo, MaxAmmo, WeaponName, Score, TimeRemaining, CurrentWave, TotalWaves, BossName, BossHealth, BossMaxHealth, Speed, CurrentGear, CurrentLap, TotalLaps, Position, XP, MaxXP, Mana, MaxMana, Stamina, MaxStamina, Gold, Level<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

WIDGET: WBP_TestHUD
THEME: Normal

CANVAS Root
  PROGRESS_BAR HealthBar
    @anchor: TopLeft

    @anchor: Center
    @text: +
    @font_size: 24
    @color: $text
    @opacity: 0.7<|eot_id|>

You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties

BUTTON: text, font_size

You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties

TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size
IMAGE: tint, size_x, size_y

You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties
anchor, offset_x, offset_y, size_x, size_y, padding, opacity, visible
TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size
IMAGE: tint, size_x, size_y
VBOX/HBOX: spacing

## Variable Naming Convention
PlayerHealth, MaxHealth, CurrentAmmo, MaxAmmo, WeaponName, Score, TimeRemaining, CurrentWave, TotalWaves, BossName, BossHealth, BossMaxHealth, Speed, CurrentGear, CurrentLap, TotalLaps, Position, XP, MaxXP, Mana, MaxMana, Stamina, MaxStamina, Gold, Level<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties
anchor, offset_x, offset_y, size_x, size_y, padding, opacity, visible
TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size
IMAGE: tint, size_x, size_y
VBOX/HBOX: spacing

## Variable Naming Convention
PlayerHealth, MaxHealth, CurrentAmmo, MaxAmmo, WeaponName, Score, TimeRemaining, CurrentWave, TotalWaves, BossName, BossHealth, BossMaxHealth, Speed, CurrentGear, CurrentLap, TotalLaps, Position, XP, MaxXP, Mana, MaxMana, Stamina, MaxStamina, Gold, Level<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties
anchor, offset_x, offset_y, size_x, size_y, padding, opacity, visible
TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size
IMAGE: tint, size_x, size_y
VBOX/HBOX: spacing

## Variable Naming Convention

    @bold: true<|eot_id|>

You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties
anchor, offset_x, offset_y, size_x, size_y, padding, opacity, visible
TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size
IMAGE: tint, size_x, size_y
VBOX/HBOX: spacing

## Variable Naming Convention
PlayerHealth, MaxHealth, CurrentAmmo, MaxAmmo, WeaponName, Score, TimeRemaining, CurrentWave, TotalWaves, BossName, BossHealth, BossMaxHealth, Speed, CurrentGear, CurrentLap, TotalLaps, Position, XP, MaxXP, Mana, MaxMana, Stamina, MaxStamina, Gold, Level<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

      @font_size: 16

      @font_size: 20

    TEXT After

      @color: $accent<|eot_id|>

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties
anchor, offset_x, offset_y, size_x, size_y, padding, opacity, visible
TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size
IMAGE: tint, size_x, size_y
VBOX/HBOX: spacing

## Variable Naming Convention
PlayerHealth, MaxHealth, CurrentAmmo, MaxAmmo, WeaponName, Score, TimeRemaining, CurrentWave, TotalWaves, BossName, BossHealth, BossMaxHealth, Speed, CurrentGear, CurrentLap, TotalLaps, Position, XP, MaxXP, Mana, MaxMana, Stamina, MaxStamina, Gold, Level<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

Create a cartoon journal codex with categories<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

WIDGET: WBP_JournalCodex
THEME: Cartoon

CANVAS Root
  VBOX JournalCodex
    @anchor: Center
    @spacing: 8
    BUTTON LoreTab
      @text: Lore
      @font_size: 14
    BUTTON BestiaryTab
      @text: Bestiary
      @font_size: 14
    TEXT EntryTitle
      @text: BIND:"{EntryName}"
      @font_size: 20
      @color: $primary
      @bold: true
    TEXT EntryText
      @text: BIND:"{EntryContent}"
      @font_size: 13
      @color: $text
      @wrap: true<|eot_id|>

You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties
anchor, offset_x, offset_y, size_x, size_y, padding, opacity, visible
TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size
IMAGE: tint, size_x, size_y
VBOX/HBOX: spacing

## Variable Naming Convention
PlayerHealth, MaxHealth, CurrentAmmo, MaxAmmo, WeaponName, Score, TimeRemaining, CurrentWave, TotalWaves, BossName, BossHealth, BossMaxHealth, Speed, CurrentGear, CurrentLap, TotalLaps, Position, XP, MaxXP, Mana, MaxMana, Stamina, MaxStamina, Gold, Level<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties
anchor, offset_x, offset_y, size_x, size_y, padding, opacity, visible
TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size
IMAGE: tint, size_x, size_y
VBOX/HBOX: spacing

## Variable Naming Convention
PlayerHealth, MaxHealth, CurrentAmmo, MaxAmmo, WeaponName, Score, TimeRemaining, CurrentWave, TotalWaves, BossName, BossHealth, BossMaxHealth, Speed, CurrentGear, CurrentLap, TotalLaps, Position, XP, MaxXP, Mana, MaxMana, Stamina, MaxStamina, Gold, Level<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

<|begin_of_text|><|start_header_id|>system<|end_header_id|>

You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```
WIDGET: WBP_Name
THEME: ThemeName

CANVAS Root
  WIDGET_TYPE WidgetName
    @property: value
    @anim:TriggerName = AnimType|param=value
```

## Rules
- First line: WIDGET: followed by the blueprint name (WBP_ prefix)
- Second line: THEME: followed by theme name
- Root widget is always CANVAS Root
- Indent with 2 spaces per nesting level
- Properties start with @ prefix
- Bindings use BIND: prefix in values
- Animations use @anim:Trigger = Type|params format

## Valid Widget Types
CANVAS, VBOX, HBOX, OVERLAY, SIZEBOX, GRID, TEXT, IMAGE, PROGRESS_BAR, BUTTON, SPACER, BORDER, INPUT, CHECKBOX, SLIDER, SCROLLBOX

## Valid Themes
Normal, SciFi, Medieval, Racing, Fighting, Simulation, Horror, Cartoon

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Fill, FillX, FillY

## Theme Color References (use $ prefix)
$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg, $card_bg, $surface, $text, $text_secondary, $text_muted, $border, $health, $health_low, $mana, $stamina, $xp

## Binding Syntax
- Simple variable: BIND:VariableName
- Expression: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
- Format string: BIND:"{Current}/{Max}"

## Valid Animation Types (with params)
Shake: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

## Common Properties
anchor, offset_x, offset_y, size_x, size_y, padding, opacity, visible
TEXT: text, font_size, color, bold, italic, wrap, justification
PROGRESS_BAR: percent, fill_color, bar_color
BUTTON: text, font_size
IMAGE: tint, size_x, size_y
VBOX/HBOX: spacing

## Variable Naming Convention
PlayerHealth, MaxHealth, CurrentAmmo, MaxAmmo, WeaponName, Score, TimeRemaining, CurrentWave, TotalWaves, BossName, BossHealth, BossMaxHealth, Speed, CurrentGear, CurrentLap, TotalLaps, Position, XP, MaxXP, Mana, MaxMana, Stamina, MaxStamina, Gold, Level<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>
